title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra hands-on: Upstaged by the base model - Engadget
summary: After using the Z Fold 8 Ultra for around two hours, I'm kind of conflicted. As it is, this phone feels more like a second-gen Galaxy Z Fold 7 instead of being a proper Ultra version of the base Z Fold 8.
caption: output/2026-07-22/samsung-galaxy-z-fold-8-ultra-hands-on-upstaged-by-the-base-model-enga.txt
